category_sources: source_facts.description says it performs a DHCP request to check whether a DHCP server is running.
source_facts.executables lists dhcping as a command-line executable.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the original author homepage referenced by the package metadata.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the original author site and is the best official documentation surface identified.
source_facts.source-archive points to the Debian original tarball rather than a separate official docs site.
repo_sources: No official source-control repository was present in source_facts.repo.
source_facts.source-archive is a Debian source tarball, not an official source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies DHCP server checking behavior.
